note: Incidents cannot be raised on mlModel entities, only on datasets/dataJobs/etc, so the model gets the structured property + tag + RCA and the upstream dataset gets the incident.
title: Silent drift: null_default_regression on PageValues
description: Traced from degraded model urn:li:mlModel:(urn:li:dataPlatform:mlflow,online_shoppers_purchase_intent,PROD). roc_auc 0.808->0.7131 (label-free CBPE), drop 0.0949. Root cause in ecommerce.web_sessions. Owner: urn:li:corpGroup:data-engineering.
